name: hermini
description: Hermini — a tiny Hermes agent that lives on your Mac desktop and surfaces local cron signals.

scripts.dev: npm run refresh-signal && concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env ELECTRON_START_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.start: npm run refresh-signal && npm run build && electron .
scripts.build: npm run refresh-signal && tsc --noEmit && vite build
